# UC-12.7.1 · Argo CD ApplicationSet Controller Drift — Generated Applications vs Cluster Reality

## Description

ApplicationSet is the factory for Argo CD Applications; when the controller cannot materialize expected apps or reports degraded conditions, new environments and tenants silently stop receiving GitOps coverage. Tracking reconcile errors and generated-app cardinality catches template mistakes, generator misconfigurations, and permission regressions before clusters run understaffed.

## Value

Prevents missing Application resources that would leave namespaces without sync policies, which otherwise surface only as unexplained deployment stalls or manual hotfixes.

## Implementation

Enable structured logging or HEC events from the ApplicationSet controller with fields such as applicationset_name, generated_apps, status_phase, and message. Normalize multi-value app lists. Schedule hourly; join to argocd:application for orphan detection if an ApplicationSet claims N apps but fewer exist with matching labels.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:applicationset"
| eval gen_count=mvcount(mvdedup(split(mvjoin(generated_apps, ","), ",")))
| eval ready=if(match(lower(status_phase),"(?i)healthy|synced|successful"),1,0)
| where ready=0 OR match(lower(message),"(?i)error|failed|unable to generate")
| stats latest(_time) as last_event, values(status_phase) as phases, latest(message) as msg, max(gen_count) as apps_claimed by applicationset_name, namespace, cluster
| sort -last_event
```

## Visualization

Single-value (open ApplicationSet faults), timechart of error rate by cluster, table (ApplicationSet × phase × message).
